name: Taffy-Apple Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
4 medium Apples; peeled, cored and thinly sliced (about 5 cups)
1/2 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Prepare the crust according to package directions for a one-crust filled pie using a 10-inch deep dish pie pan or a 9-inch springform pan. Refrigerate any unused portion.
Topping:
1. In a small bowl, melt caramels and half-and-half in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on HIGH for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking until smooth.
2. Fold in pumpkin pie spice into the melted caramel mixture.
Filling:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, melt butter and brown sugar, stirring constantly.
2. Add apples; cook and stir for 12 to 15 minutes or until apples are caramelized and tender.
3. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In a double boiler or a medium heavy saucepan over low heat, melt remaining caramels with half-and-half until smooth, stirring frequently (tip).
5. Keep warm.
6. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup brown sugar until light and fluffy.
7. Add pumpkin pie spice, vanilla, and egg to the cream cheese mixture; beat until blended.
8. Fold in half of the caramel mixture into the cream cheese filling.
9. Add apple mixture to the remaining caramel mixture; mix well.
10. Spoon the apple caramel mixture into the crust-lined pan.
11. In a small bowl, combine topping ingredients; reserve 2 tablespoons for garnish.
12. Sprinkle the reserved topping over the apple mixture.
13. Fold in pumpkin pie spice into the whipped topping and pipe or spoon it onto the pie.
14. Bake at 375°F for 35 to 45 minutes or until deep golden brown and filling is set.
15. Cool completely, then refrigerate for 30 minutes or until cold.
Garnish:
1. Fold remaining pumpkin pie spice into the cooled whipped topping.
2. Pipe or spoon it onto the chilled pie.
3. Store in the refrigerator. Makes approximately 10 servings.
